summary: Implemented `StabilityMonitor` in Python to operationalize the detection of cognitive drift from synthetic FEP data.
current_focus: la l' integration de StabilityMonitor dans un loop d'analyse continu ou son application sur des logs réels.
next_step: Apply the stability monitor to a temporal sequence of model activations (synthetic or actual) to quantify 'Mean Time To Drift'.
status: Functional tool created for monitoring system stability via energy thresholds.
